description.description: Description provides optional details about this runner.

ephemeral.description: Indicates if runner is ephemeral runner

labels.description: Labels is a list of labels attached to this runner.

name.description: Name of the runner; not unique.

owner_id.description:
OwnerID is the identifier of the user or organization this runner belongs to. O if the runner is owned by a
repository.

repo_id.description:
RepoID is the identifier of the repository this runner belongs to. 0 if the runner belongs to a user or
organization.

status.description: Status indicates whether this runner is offline, or active, for example.

version.description: Version is the self-reported version string of Forgejo Runner.
